testcase.name: TC12 - Plot listings have no BHK filter and area budget filter works correctly
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the MagicBricks Mumbai residential page................passed Given the user navigates directly to Plot in Mumbai page....................passed Then the current filter spec should be displayed............................passed When the user clicks More Filters...........................................passed And the user selects minimum budget "500" from dropdown.....................passed And the user selects maximum budget "2000" from dropdown....................passed And the user clicks Apply Filters...........................................passed Then the updated filter spec should be displayed............................passed
